sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 20.59 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.20)

statement.latex: A subgroup$H$is called a of a group$G$if$H$is a retract of a finite-index subgroup of$G$. Is it true that every finitely generated subgroup of a finitely generated virtually free group is a virtual retract? For motivation and partial results see (A. Minasyan, Int. Math. Res. Notes, 2021, no.\,17 (2021), 13434--13477). { A.\,Minasyan}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
